recipes.title: Add a safe migration
recipes.intent: Apply a schema change without hiding deployment prerequisites.
recipes.description: Use when a persisted field requires a coordinated migration and application cutover.
recipes.summary_md:
- Define the schema change
- Register the migration
- Verify both application boundaries
recipes.request: The user asked to add graph trajectory fields and preserve existing job history.

corrections.whatAgentDid: Initially treated graph events as ordinary messages.
corrections.howCorrected: Added explicit node and event metadata to the stored trajectory contract.

pitfalls.whyNonObvious: A UI key based only on sequence looks unique in single-attempt tests.

steps.rationale: The application never synchronizes schema at startup.

recipes.rationale: The evidence demonstrates a reusable schema-and-consumer cutover sequence.
